# 30-second tour of kapi

> Generated from [`walkthroughs/kapi-overview.md`](https://github.com/neokapi/neokapi/blob/main/web/walkthroughs/kapi-overview.md). Do not edit by hand — change the prompt and regenerate.

A 30-second tour of what kapi is and what it can do. Useful as the very first thing someone sees on the kapi docs landing page.

## Scene 1 — overview

<ThemedVideo
  sources={{
    light: "/video/kapi/01-overview.webm",
    dark: "/video/kapi/01-overview.webm",
  }}
/>

`kapi --help` shows the top-level commands. `kapi formats` enumerates the available format readers. `kapi tools` lists the processing tools registry.

## Next

Drill into individual subcommands via the [Kapi CLI overview](/kapi-cli/overview).
